user.title: Set up HassGlass
user.description: Choose defaults for all paired glasses. You can pair devices after setup from the integration's Devices page.

data.pipeline_id: Default Assist pipeline ID (blank = use HA preferred)
data.wake_word_enabled: Enable on-glass wake word by default
data.fallback_media_player: Fallback media_player entity ID for announcements

abort.already_configured: HassGlass is already set up. Only one hub per Home Assistant installation is supported.

data.wake_word_enabled: Enable on-glass wake word by default

notify.name: Push HUD card
notify.description: Show a card on a glasses device's HUD.

dismiss.name: Dismiss HUD card
dismiss.description: Remove a HUD card by id, or all cards with card_id: "*".

identify.name: Identify glasses
identify.description: Briefly flash a checkmark on the HUD so the wearer knows which device was targeted.
